chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-629 of 2024 Syed Bariq Ali Versus Election Commission of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 3039/24 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.08.2024 None present. -.-.- The petitioner in the instant petition has sought a negative declaration that respondent No.3 is not entitled to contest upcoming elections as being involved in a criminal case. Such being the situation the prayer itself does not entitle the petitioner for any relief. Be that as it may, petitioner and his counsel are called absent since filing of this petition. They were called absent on 07.02.2024 and so alto today. There is not intimation either. Petition is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
